steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize the order in which the two lighthouse keepers began their careers — specifically when each one started, not when they finished.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — lacks career-start information: Does not specify when either keeper began, so it cannot establish the order of career starts. ✗
  • Choice B — 'began her career...years after': Directly compares when each career started, showing that Elizabeth began first and the other keeper began years later. ✓
  • Choice C — focuses on career endings: Shifts focus to when careers ended rather than when they began. ✗
  • Choice D — inaccurate information: Contains details that contradict the passage, making it factually wrong. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
